prompt: A cinematic shot of a lone astronaut walking through a glowing bioluminescent forest on an alien planet at blue hour. Giant translucent trees sway gently in the wind while floating particles illuminate the air. The camera begins with a wide aerial shot, then slowly descends into a smooth tracking shot following behind the astronaut before orbiting to reveal their reflective visor. Small alien creatures dart between the trees, creating subtle environmental motion. A shallow stream reflects vibrant neon blues, purples, and emerald greens. Soft volumetric fog drifts across the ground, and rays of light filter through the canopy. The astronaut pauses to touch a glowing plant, causing ripples of light to spread through the forest. The scene is highly realistic, with physically accurate lighting, natural character movement, detailed textures, cinematic depth of field, subtle lens flares, and smooth camera stabilization. Shot in 4K, 24 fps, anamorphic lens, ultra-high detail, HDR color grading, realistic physics, no flickering, consistent character appearance, consistent lighting, and seamless temporal coherence. Duration: 10 seconds.
